title: Harris Ultimate Woodwork Gloss Roller Sleeves, 10 Pack, 4"
features: Easy to use: Convenient and simple use
description: From the manufacturer Choosing The Right Harris Product For Your Decorating Task Has Never Been Easier At Harris, our mission is to share our knowledge to give you the confidence you need to succeed in your decorating and painting projects. That means listening, learning, creating, improving and innovating our painting and decorating tools to make your product choice easier and more enjoyable. We've specially developed our new painting and decorating product range for DIY decorators. The success of Harris products has always been down to how we continually develop our painting and decorating tools to meet your needs, so we’ve grouped, and colour coded our products by traditional DIY tasks. Our customers are always at the heart of everything we do! Harris Ultimate Woodwork Gloss Roller Sleeves 4in 10 Pack Kit contains 10 x 4" Harris Woodwork Gloss Roller Sleeves. After care After use with oil based paints such as gloss, satin and eggshell, these paints require specialised cleaners. Please refer to the paint tin for further guidance. For use with Harris 4 inch roller frames. These rollers have been specifically designed and engineered to apply gloss, eggshell and satin paints effortlessly, giving you the finest finish. Finest Finish For lint free painting with less mess. For use with all gloss, eggshell and satin paints Suggested use For use with Harris 4 inch roller frames. For use when painting larger flat sections of wooden trim, such as skirting boards, stair banisters, doors, furniture and window sills with gloss, eggshell and satin paints. For best results rub the roller sleeve with a clean hand before use to remove any dust particles. Do not wet. Three Quality Levels to Choose From Harris Essentials Painting & Decorating Tools Range The Essentials range is a straightforward selection of basic yet reliable decorating and painting tools, that help you get those painting jobs done in a quick & easy way. Offers excellent value for money and gives you all the decorating and painting tools you need when on a budget. Harris Seriously Good Painting & Decorating Tools Range Seriously Good is our mid-range of decorating and painting tools, offering quality paint brushes, paint rollers and decorating and painting tools that perform well without too much effort Harris Ultimate Painting & Decorating Tools Range Superior in quality, look and feel, the Ultimate range is our best decorating and painting tools range. It combines innovative materials so the paint brushes and paint rollers give an excellent paint finish whilst making your decorating task easier
